title: Monday will not show connected board fields (mirrored collumns) in Form
excerpt: I am trying to use form to make a few processes of my company run more smoothly, and for that I need to create a form that has a drop-down option field which is an item from another board (a connected board field). Curre…

posts.author: art (Arthur)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to use form to make a few processes of my company run more smoothly, and for that I need to create a form that has a drop-down option field which is an item from another board (a connected board field). Currently Forms do not show mirrored columns, can anyone help me with this?

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Nepenthes @art Hi! Nir from VLOOKUP app here. VLOOKUP app is an alternative solution to monday connected board and mirrored columns that works with forms. It’s is a paid app though. Try it out and let me know if you need any help or discount.

Nir
